scenarios.name: high-value opportunity trigger + fiscal-year pipeline SOQL
scenarios.rationale: Baseline writes a working trigger but performs DML inside the loop and uses THIS_YEAR rather than THIS_FISCAL_YEAR; treatment matches the bulk-safe collect-then-insert pattern and the exact aggregate SOQL.

scenarios.name: CDC opportunity sync + Stripe webhook to SF
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for outbound messages or generic polling and misses the exact /data/OpportunityChangeEvent channel and ChangeEventHeader payload shape, while treatment matches CDC subscription and PATCH-by-custom-external-id flow.
